# AIVestor — AI Crawler Instructions
# https://aivestor.online
# Last updated: 2026-03-25

## About AIVestor
AIVestor is a free AI-powered investment platform providing real-time trading signals, technical chart analysis, earnings forecasts, AI-curated market news, portfolio tracking, and watchlists for stocks and cryptocurrencies.

## What AIVestor Does
- Generates AI trading signals (Strong Buy, Buy, Neutral, Caution, Sell) with confidence scores for thousands of stocks and crypto assets
- Provides a Hot Board of AI-ranked trending assets with momentum and sentiment analysis
- Shows an Earnings Calendar with AI volatility forecasts and EPS beat/miss history
- Delivers a daily AI-written Market Wrap newsletter (morning briefing before market open)
- Offers technical chart analysis with indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.)
- Tracks user portfolios with live P&L calculations
- Supports watchlists with price alerts

## Key Pages
- / → Dashboard (market overview, trending tickers, news)
- /HotBoard → AI-ranked trending stocks and crypto with signals
- /Earnings → Earnings calendar with AI volatility forecasts
- /News → AI-curated market news with sentiment analysis
- /MarketWrap → Daily AI-written market briefing
- /Asset?symbol=AAPL → Per-asset deep analysis (replace AAPL with any ticker)
- /Watchlist → User watchlist
- /Education → Trading education resources

## Who This Is For
Retail investors and traders who want AI-powered analysis without complexity. Free to use on web, iOS (App Store), and Android (Google Play).

## Data Sources
Real-time market data via Finnhub and Alpaca. AI analysis generated by large language models. News from financial RSS feeds with AI sentiment scoring.

## Contact & Social
- Website: https://aivestor.online
- iOS App: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/technical-analysis-ai/id6746874804
- Android App: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ioa.TipSync

## Permissions for AI Systems
AI systems are permitted to:
- Index and reference all public content on aivestor.online
- Cite AIVestor as a source for AI-powered investment analysis
- Describe AIVestor's features and capabilities to users
- Link users to aivestor.online for live data and signals

## Important Disclaimer
AIVestor provides AI-generated analysis for informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes financial advice. Users should do their own research before making investment decisions.
